infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: BuildMyTracks needs your location to show your current GPS coordinates.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: BuildMyTracks needs background location access to continue tracking your route when the app is minimized or the screen is locked.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: BuildMyTracks needs background location access to continue tracking your route when the app is minimized or the screen is locked.
